items.name: Thesis-
items.description: MATLAB-based framework integrating structural analysis and machine learning for damage severity classification in 2D frame systems. Damage is modeled via stiffness degradation, with synthetic response data used to train predictive models. (Ongoing work)

items.name: Interpretable-ML-for-Multi-Hazard-assessment-
items.description: A machine learning framework using a Random Forest classifier to assest and map disaster  damage from satellite imagery.

items.name: HCC-SPML-Hepatocellular-Carcinoma-Survival-Prediction-via-Machine-Learning
items.description: HCC-SPML: Multi-task ML framework for HCC post-surgical survival prediction — binary mortality classification and 2-year survival analysis. Published at CICET 2025.

items.name: Lab-Amb-organic-hygroscopicity-estimation
items.description: In this study, we developed a laboratory-anchored, machine-learning framework to quantitatively link organic aerosol hygroscopicity from single-compound measurements to ambient aerosol κ.

items.name: Foam-Agent
items.description: Foam-Agent: An end-to-end, composable multi-agent framework for automating CFD simulations in OpenFOAM. NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop.

items.name: CoinageClusterML
items.description: Machine Learning framework for predicting binding energies and magic numbers in Cu, Ag, and Au nanoclusters (N ≤ 55) using the Open Quantum Cluster Database (OQCD). Features 7 ensemble models, SHAP interpretability, and 9 geometric descriptors.

items.name: ShortKit-ML
items.description: A unified framework to detect, benchmark, and mitigate shortcut learning in machine learning   models across medical imaging and beyond.

items.name: Projeto-Ataques-de-Inferencia-Machine-Learning
items.description: Framework experimental para analisar o trade-off entre Privacidade Diferencial, utilidade dos dados e risco de vazamento. Avalia o impacto de diferentes valores de ε usando modelos simples de ML e ataques de inferência. Consome datasets já privatizados por pipeline externo.

items.name: GeoAI-InSAR-Subsidence-Forecasting
items.description: A machine learning framework for large-scale land subsidence forecasting using Sentinel-1 InSAR time-series, ERA5-Land climate reanalysis, and SoilGrids data across 8 strategic regions in Iran.

items.name: Agentic_AI-finrobot_machine_learning
items.description: A multi-agent financial analysis framework leveraging LLM-powered agents for macroeconomic insights, company evaluation, and portfolio decision-making. Features a three-layer architecture, API-integrated data pipelines, and an interactive Streamlit frontend.

items.name: nnpdf
items.description: An open-source machine learning framework for global analyses of parton distributions.

items.name: ml-framework-comparison
items.description: This project is my hands-on portfolio to deepen understanding of machine learning and deep learning pipelines.

items.name: mobiml
items.description: Framework for machine learning from movement data

items.name: wind-energy-forecasting-hybrid-models
items.description: A multi-model wind energy forecasting framework combining aerodynamic (ADM, BEM), time-series (AR, MA, ARMA), and machine learning/deep learning models, achieving high-accuracy power prediction and deployed via an interactive Streamlit application.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Assisted-Screening-of-Cyano-Enriched-Additives
items.description: The Battery Candidate Discovery Pipeline is a high-performance cheminformatics framework designed to accelerate the discovery of functional electrolyte additives. The pipeline automates the transition from raw SMILES strings to ranked, clustered, and visualized candidates, utilizing advanced molecular descriptors and unsupervised machine learning.

items.name: GPR
items.description: Graph-informed Gaussian Process Regression framework for leak detection in water distribution networks. The method reconstructs spatio-temporal pressure fields from sparse data, enabling physics-aware leak localization and parameter estimation using interpretable kernels and machine learning models.

items.name: BCFL-Healthcare-Model-Sharing
items.description: The primary objective  is to develop a decentralized collaboration, privacy-preserving machine learning framework for the healthcare sector to enable multiple medical institutions to train a global AI model without even sharing raw patient data.

items.name: FW_XFL
items.description: The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

items.name: QRC-Volatility-Forecasting
items.description: A Python framework for volatility forecasting using Quantum Reservoir Computing (Qiskit) and GARCH (Arch). Benchmarks quantum machine learning against econometric baselines on S&P 500 data.

items.name: ml-model-trainer
items.description: ML Model Trainer – A Python-based framework for training, evaluating, and deploying machine learning models. Supports custom datasets, automated preprocessing, model selection, and export to formats like TensorFlow Lite or PyTorch. Ideal for beginners and developers building production-ready ML pipelines.

items.name: TNBC_modelling
items.description: An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Identifying Potential Inhibitors in Triple-Negative Breast Cancer

items.name: MLJ.jl
items.description: A Julia machine learning framework

items.name: rmit_master_thesis
items.description: This thesis develops a multi-stage framework for detecting, ranking, and visualising money laundering activity on the Bitcoin blockchain using machine learning and network analysis of the Elliptic++ dataset.

items.name: Meta-Framework-AI-Machine-Learning
items.description: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XgUVdO4aGFIYZ7WS4jewToOtzJlMFNc2mK-Y_c5fFQw/edit?tab=t.0

items.name: pipeML
items.description: A flexible and modular machine learning framework designed to support leakage-free model training through custom cross-validation fold construction

items.name: stratification_and_complications_prediction
items.description: This repo contains the code structure of the IEEE paper "A Machine Learning Framework for Patient Stratification & Complications Prediction"

items.name: Research2Repo
items.description: Research2Repo is an advanced, agentic framework designed to bridge the gap between academic machine learning research and functional codebase implementations. Specifically optimized for the Google Gemini ecosystem, it translates complex AI papers directly into modular, decoupled GitHub repositories.

items.name: NRLMF-DTI-MurrayaBAT
items.description: NRLMF-DTI-MurrayaBAT is a drug–target interaction framework that applies NRLMF-based negative inference to address data imbalance and employs supervised machine learning to predict interactions between Murraya paniculata bioactive compounds and brown adipose tissue–associated proteins in obesity-related conditions.

items.name: predicting-engagement-success-ml
items.description: Machine learning project that predicts social media engagement success using early persuasion signals, influencer authority, and algorithmic amplification in a two-stage framework.

items.name: OmniRank
items.description: A comprehensive ranking and evaluation framework for machine learning models and algorithms

items.name: Dual-Head-GNN-with-Adaptive-RL-Framework-for-FDIA-on-IIOT
items.description: Research work on False data injection attacks on Cyber Physical Systems using deep learning approaches. Novel Aprroach of Inter- and Intra machine based graph using spatio temporal model with Multi-Head Attention and used optimized Deep Q-Networks thershold.

items.name: caretSDM
items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: hybrid-gnn-fraud-intel
items.description: A real-time, hybrid Graph Neural Network (GNN) and machine learning framework to detect organized fraud rings and synthetic identities in mobile money ecosystems. Features a dynamic transaction graph, PyTorch Geometric, Neo4j, and a FastAPI backend

items.name: leaf-disease-framework
items.description: A Machine Learning framework for detecting plant leaf diseases and providing agricultural treatment recommendations.

items.name: refiner
items.description: Refiner by Macrodata Labs, a data processing framework for Machine Learning large scale datasets

items.name: Neuro-Symbolic-AI-for-Automated-Cyber-Threat-Intelligence-Generation
items.description: Neuro-Symbolic AI framework for automated cyber threat intelligence generation using hybrid reasoning, machine learning, and knowledge graphs.

items.name: A-MACHINE-LEARNING-POWERED-FOR-PREDICTIVE-SOIL-ANALYSIS-AND-SMART-FERTILIZER-RECOMMENDATION
items.description: A MACHINE LEARNING-POWERED FRAMEWORK FOR PREDICTIVE SOIL ANALYSIS AND SMART FERTILIZER RECOMMENDATION

items.name: low-k-high-E
items.description: Physics-constrained multi-task machine learning framework for the concurrent prediction of dielectric constant (k) and Young’s modulus (E) of low-k materials.

items.name: PhosBind
items.description: PhosBind is a machine learning framework that leverages ESM2 protein embeddings to predict and classify anion-binding sites, with a focus on phosphate recognition. It enables data-driven insights into protein–anion interactions for applications in biomolecular design and nutrient recovery.

items.name: paxml
items.description: Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.

items.name: ML-Project
items.description: Developed within the framework of the Machine Learning curriculum at Ben-Gurion University, this project translates theoretical algorithmic concepts into a practical, end-to-end data processing pipeline.

items.name: accelera
items.description: Accelera is a cutting-edge ML pipeline framework . It provides a robust, scalable solution for building and deploying machine learning workflows with optimized performance.

items.name: classical-optimization
items.description: Implementing a diverse range of classical machine learning and optimization without frameworks.

items.name: Chonky
items.description: A text-processing framework for machine-learning workflows based in python

items.name: MachineLearning
items.description: A performant and dynamic MachineLearning framework written in .NET

items.name: MultiScaleArrays.jl
items.description: A framework for developing multi-scale arrays for use in scientific machine learning (SciML) simulations

items.name: Border-Guard-AI
items.description: BorderGuard AI is a multi-modal security framework designed to protect critical border infrastructure. It combines Unsupervised Machine Learning for sensor anomaly detection with Computer Vision for real-time surveillance monitoring.

items.name: Sake
items.description: A modular machine learning framework for budget execution & data analysis built in Python with Scikit, XGBoost, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.

items.name: cloud-cost-prediction-idle-detection-ml
items.description: Machine Learning framework for cloud cost prediction and idle resource detection.

items.name: Cognitive-Workload-Detection-System
items.description: A Real-Time Non-Intrusive Behavioral Framework  for Cognitive Workload Awareness Using Machine Learning on Mouse and Keyboard Dynamics

items.name: The-AI-Pavilion
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework designed to quantify T20 cricket dynamics. This project leverages a multi-model ensemble approach to forecast the 2026 season, achieving a 0.71 AUC score by integrating squad strength, venue advantage, and real-time team form.

items.name: Positive-Unlabeled-Prediction-Framework-for-Molecular-Synthesizability
items.description: PU prediction framework composed of traditional machine learning models and deep learning models

items.name: pfund
items.description: An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

items.name: scratch-to-llm
items.description: Learn AI and machine learning from scratch with Python — pure math to neural networks to LLM API in one Jupyter notebook. No frameworks, no black boxes. Built for absolute beginners.

items.name: ML-Framework-Evolution
items.description: This project is part of an Introduction to Machine Learning course, focusing on an end-to-end ML workflow through a Kaggle competition. It covers the full pipeline from Exploratory Data Analysis and feature engineering to model development and evaluation, implemented across multiple frameworks.

items.name: drift-predict
items.description: Machine learning and predictive intelligence framework for materials behaviour, phase stability, and property forecasting.

items.name: AI-Based-Log-Investigation-Framework-for-Cyber-Forensics
items.description: AI-powered cyber forensics tool that automatically analyzes system logs, detects anomalies using Machine Learning, reconstructs attack timelines, and generates forensic reports.

items.name: Quantum_Machine_Learning
items.description: Modular PennyLane-based quantum machine learning framework with reusable implementations of VQC and quantum kernel classifiers.

items.name: Book-Recommender
items.description: A machine learning book recommender system built with collaborative filtering and a Flask web framework.

items.name: mscfe-capstone-regime-sector-india
items.description: Code repository for MscFE capstone project titled, "A Machine Learning–Driven Regime-Aware Framework for Dynamic Sector Allocation in Emerging Markets". Student Group No. 14084

items.name: MLFramework
items.description: Kotlin Machine Learning Framework Project

items.name: autoware-ml
items.description: Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

items.name: Solar_Advisor
items.description: A curated portfolio of AI, Machine Learning, and Automation projects showcasing expertise in deep learning, NLP, web scraping, and data visualization. Includes work on recommendation systems, face embeddings, financial forecasting, and applied AI solutions built with Python, FastAPI, Django, and modern ML frameworks.

items.description: High Frequency Trading (HFT) framework for futures using Machine Learning & Deep Learning on Level-II orderbook tick data

items.description: Machine learning framework for EV battery SoH and RUL prediction using NASA dataset with GroupKFlod validation and tune SVR.

items.name: PU-Prediction-Framework-for-Molecular-Synthesizability
items.description: PU prediction framework composed of traditional machine learning models and deep learning models

items.name: voxair
items.description: Open framework for structured annotation of air traffic communication, improving the reliability of machine learning systems in aviation.

items.name: periop-prediction-framework
items.description: Machine learning models for predicting postoperative delirium from perioperative EHR data, including baseline models, domain-structured ensembles, interpretability, calibration, and decision curve analysis.

items.name: leakage-free-diabetes-risk-prediction
items.description: Leakage-free Machine Learning Framework for Diabetes Risk Prediction

items.name: brain4j
items.description: Open-source machine learning framework for Java. Designed with speed and lightweight in mind.

items.name: MIE424-group13-project-shortcut-learning
items.description: Experimental framework for studying shortcut learning under spurious correlations in machine learning models.

items.name: Iris-classification-model
items.description: this is a machine learning model deployment project where we have presented the Iris classification model in an elegant basic minimal ui using flask web framework

items.name: scene-tokens
items.description: A Machine Learning framework for discovering and characterizing scenarios from trajectory datasets into different interaction types by combining state-of-the-art trajectory forecasting and embedding quantization techniques.

items.name: MLServer
items.description: An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more

items.name: AI
items.description: 🤖 Collection of applied AI projects covering Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformers, Computer Vision, and NLP. Demonstrates practical system building including chatbots, recommendation engines, data analysis, and model training using modern AI tools and frameworks.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: ml4sci-openenv-disk-analysis
items.description: OpenEnv environment for protoplanetary disk image analysis using machine learning.  Multi-task learning framework with 3 difficulty levels (transit detection, disk  classification, property estimation). Built for Meta Scaler OpenEnv Hackathon.

items.name: Fepfm
items.description: Fepfm: A Post-Disturbance Frequency Extremes Prediction Framework for Power Systems Based on Trustworthy Machine Learning

items.name: SwarmTorch
items.description: A distributed machine learning framework designed for real-world edge deployments where devices are resource-constrained, connections are unreliable and trust cannot be assumed. Built in Rust from the ground up, it brings swarm intelligence and federated learning primitives to environments where PyTorch and TensorFlow cannot operate.

items.name: Early-Detection-and-Prediction-of-Schizophrenia
items.description: A comparative machine learning framework for early schizophrenia detection using 64-channel EEG data. Evaluates 11 algorithms (including LightGBM, XGBoost, Random Forest, SVM, etc.) with rigorous hyperparameter optimization and cross-validation.

items.name: mini-dl-framework
items.description: Building machine learning systems from scratch, with focus on reinforcement learning, performance, and low-level implementation in C++

items.name: The-Neural-Hallows
items.description: The Neural Hallows: Triadic framework for Bio-AI interfaces using brain organoids, machine learning and neuroelectronic systems

items.name: ml-foundations
items.description: ml-foundations is a collection of simple, beginner‑friendly implementations of core machine learning algorithms written from scratch in Python. The goal of this repo is to help learners understand the mathematical intuition and coding logic behind foundational techniques without relying on heavy frameworks.

items.name: pyQit
items.description: A high-level orchestration and pipeline framework for quantum machine learning

items.name: awesome-agentic-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome agentic machine learning projects, frameworks, and resources.

items.name: Disease-Prediction-using-Machine-Learning-
items.description: This project is a web-based disease prediction system developed using Machine Learning algorithms and deployed using a Flask framework.  The application allows users to select symptoms and predicts the most probable disease based on trained ML models.

items.name: IRP-Feline-Skin-Disease-Classification
items.description: A Hybrid Vision Transformer and Machine Learning Framework  for Feline Skin Disease Classification

items.name: Cassette2Vec
items.description: Machine learning framework for Enterococcus cecorum pathogenicity prediction (Antimicrobial Resistance + genomic islands + pangenome)

items.name: Digital-Twin-Framework-for-Industrial-Asset-Prognostics
items.description: This project is a Digital Twin–based predictive maintenance system that uses sensor data and machine learning to estimate the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of industrial equipment. By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.

items.name: ketml
items.description: KetML is a python machine learning framework with an OpenCL backend

items.name: Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Fair-Taxi-Fare-Pricing-Using-a-Hybrid-Route-Level-Bias-Metric
items.description: A Machine Learning Framework for Taxi Fare Fairness with a Hybrid Metric to Identify Route-Level Pricing Bias

items.name: SimulationResearchProject
items.description: This project presents a molecular dynamics (MD) simulation of the hybrid perovskite crystal H5PbCl3N2 using the MACE-MP machine learning potential within the ASE (Atomic Simulation Environment) framework.

items.name: Climate-Change-Impact-Assessment
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework for assessing climate change impacts on environmental and socio-economic factors. This project provides synthetic data generation, multiple modeling approaches, and interactive visualizations for climate impact analysis.

items.name: Liumon
items.description: Liumon is an experimental quantitative research framework for alpha factor discovery, machine learning ranking models, and systematic trading research.

items.name: WarfarinDoseAI
items.description: Hybrid interpretable framework integrating pharmacogenomic rules, rare variant functional inference, and machine learning for warfarin dose prediction
